code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 17 to Java 21.
code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets Java 21, so the compiler must be configured to generate bytecode compatible with Java 21; otherwise, it will compile for Java 17.

code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit release configuration to the maven-compiler-plugin configuration block.
code-with-quarkus_3/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the plugin explicitly targets Java 21 release level, reinforcing the property change.
